name: Cajun Catfish Remoulade
recipeIngredient: 1 Head of Butter Lettuce, torn into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first seven ingredients in a glass jar; cover and refrigerate overnight.
2. Cut catfish fillets into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large saucepan, bring water, Old Bay Seasoning, bay leaves, and cayenne pepper to a gentle simmer.
4. Add catfish fillets and cook until the meat flakes, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Cover and let the fish cool in the cooking liquid; refrigerate until serving time.
6. To serve, drain the catfish fillets and place them on a lettuce-lined platter.
7. Place the remoulade sauce in a bowl and nestle it in the center of the serving platter.
8. Garnish with tomato wedges and parsley.
